dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/1: I... I can barely stand. Please, do you have anything to eat?
dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/2: Everything's going dark around the edges... I need food, %1$s.
dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/3: I don't know how much longer I can go on like this without a meal...
dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/4: *clutches stomach* ...I'm sorry, I can't focus on anything right now.
dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/5: If I don't eat something soon, I'm going to collapse right here.
dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/7: I can't remember the last time I ate. My hands won't stop shaking.
dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/8: I'd give anything for even a piece of bread right now, %1$s.
dialogue.chat.hunger.famished/1: I haven't eaten in ages... do you have anything?
dialogue.chat.hunger.famished/3: I can't stop thinking about food right now...
dialogue.chat.hunger.famished/4: My stomach has been growling all day. I really need to find something to eat.
dialogue.chat.hunger.famished/5: I'd trade my best boots for a warm meal right about now.
dialogue.chat.hunger.famished/6: Have you seen any food around? I'm getting desperate, %1$s.
dialogue.chat.hunger.famished/7: Sorry if I seem distracted. It's hard to think about anything but food.
dialogue.chat.hunger.famished/8: I keep eyeing the crops in the fields... they can't grow fast enough.
dialogue.chat.hunger.hungry/1: I could really go for a bite to eat, honestly.
dialogue.chat.hunger.hungry/2: Is it lunchtime yet? My stomach seems to think so.
dialogue.chat.hunger.hungry/3: I've been meaning to grab something to eat. Just haven't gotten around to it.
dialogue.chat.hunger.hungry/4: Something smells good around here... or maybe I'm just hungry.
dialogue.chat.hunger.hungry/5: A nice stew would really hit the spot right about now.
dialogue.chat.hunger.hungry/6: I wonder what's for supper tonight? I'm getting a bit peckish.
dialogue.chat.thirst.dehydrated/1: My throat feels like sand... I need water now.
dialogue.chat.thirst.dehydrated/2: Please... water... I can barely speak.
dialogue.chat.thirst.dehydrated/3: I'm so dehydrated I can hardly think straight.
dialogue.chat.thirst.dehydrated/4: Everything tastes like dust right now.
dialogue.chat.thirst.parched/1: I'm parched. Have you seen any clean water?
dialogue.chat.thirst.parched/2: I would trade a meal for a drink right now.
dialogue.chat.thirst.parched/3: My lips are dry and my head hurts. I need a drink.
dialogue.chat.thirst.parched/4: A cool drink would make all the difference right now.
dialogue.chat.thirst.thirsty/1: I could really use something to drink.
dialogue.chat.thirst.thirsty/2: Do we have any water nearby?
dialogue.chat.thirst.thirsty/3: I've been working all day and I'm getting thirsty.
dialogue.chat.thirst.thirsty/4: A sip of water sounds perfect about now.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_field_post: Hey %1$s, could you set up a Field Post? I need to know which plots to work.
I can't really get started without a Field Post showing me where to farm.
Drop a Field Post somewhere and paint in the plots, and I'll take it from there.
I don't want to mess with crops that weren't meant for me. A Field Post would sort that out.
Ready to farm, just need a Field Post first so I know what's what.
Put a Field Post down and mark what you'd like planted, %1$s, and I'll handle the rest.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_seeds/1: I can keep this farm going, but I need seeds.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_seeds/2: We're out of planting seed. Could someone bring some?
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_seeds/3: No seeds left for replanting. I need a fresh supply.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_seeds/4: I've got fields ready, but no seeds to sow.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_seeds/5: If you want crops soon, please bring seeds.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_seeds/6: Seed stock is empty. I need restocking, %1$s.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_tool/1: I can't till properly without a hoe.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_tool/2: My hoe supply is gone. I need one to continue.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_tool/3: Fields are waiting, but I don't have a hoe.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_tool/4: Could someone hand me a usable hoe?
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_tool/5: No hoe, no tilling. I need a tool.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_tool/6: I can work as soon as I have a hoe again.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.unreachable/1: I can't reach part of the farm from here.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.unreachable/2: Something's blocking my path to the field.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.unreachable/3: The route to my work area is obstructed.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.unreachable/4: I need a clear path to keep farming efficiently.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.unreachable/5: I keep getting blocked trying to reach the crops.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.unreachable/6: Could we clear a path to the field, please?
dialogue.chat.farm_request.out_of_scope/: This area is beyond my assigned farm range.
I need to stay near my farm anchor to work.
I can help better if we keep the farm compact.
My assigned farm area ends a bit closer in.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_water_plan: The soil is too dry for good yields. We need irrigation.
I can expand once this field has enough water coverage.
This plot needs a nearby water source before I till more.
Could someone help with irrigation? The farm is too dry.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.no_valid_targ: No urgent farm tasks right now.
Nothing workable at the moment on this plot.
I'm waiting for the next farm task to become available.
The field is stable for now. I'll resume when needed.
dialogue.chat.farm_request.unsupported_c: I found a crop I don't know how to replant yet.
This crop type isn't in my farming routine yet.
I can harvest this, but replanting is unclear.
I need better farming instructions for this crop.
dialogue.chat.butcher_flavor.shop_promot: The shop is taking shape. First proper butcher's bench in the village.
Now this is a real butchery. Basin, hook, and everything.
A master's shop, %1$s. Grinder, rack, pestle, freezer. I'll want for nothing.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_hook/1: I need a hook to hang the carcass on.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_hook/2: Set a rope and hook somewhere in the shop.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_hook/3: Without a hook, I can't start the real work.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_hook/4: The carcass needs to hang. Where's the hook, %1$s?
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_livesto: No beasts inside the shop. Bring a cow or two.
The pen is empty. I need livestock to work.
Fence a few in and I'll get started.
I could butcher all day, but there's nothing to butcher.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_basin/1: A basin under the carcass would catch the blood.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_basin/2: I need a basin to bleed this one out.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_basin/3: Place a basin and I can start draining.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_basin/4: The floor will be a mess without a basin.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.slaughter_: You've told me not to kill anything. Fair enough.
Hand me the stock and I'll process it. No slaughter on my end.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.carcass_st: This carcass has me stumped. Something's off.
Can't make sense of this cut. Let me try again later.
Strange state. I'll need to start fresh.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_cleaver: I need a cleaver before I can carve anything.
No cleaver in my kit. Bring me one, %1$s.
Hand me a proper cleaver and I'll get to work.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_skinnin: Can't take the skin off without a skinning knife.
Hand me a skinning knife, %1$s, or this hide stays on.
A cleaver would ruin the skin. I need a proper knife.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_hacksaw: I need a hacksaw to cut through that iron body.
A hacksaw, %1$s. Cleavers and knives won't touch this one.
Bring me a hacksaw. An iron golem doesn't butcher itself.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_grinder: A meat grinder would let me mince this.
Add a grinder to the shop and I'll get fancy.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_skin_ra: Hides pile up without a skin rack.
Need somewhere to dress these skins.
A skin rack would keep this workspace tidy.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.humanoid_s: I won't touch that one. Not my line of work.
There are limits to what I'll butcher, %1$s.
Find someone else for that kind of work.
dialogue.chat.village_life.butcher_shop/: The butcher's always busy. Hard work, that.
I dropped off a basket at the butcher's this morning. They're good folk.
Fresh cuts in the shop today. My supper is sorted.
dialogue.chat.village_life.slaughterhous: The slaughterhouse gets grim at dawn. I try not to walk past until after.
You can hear the work from the slaughterhouse on quiet days. Unsettling, but useful.
My uncle worked a slaughterhouse up north once. Said it's cleaner than people think.
dialogue.chat.village_life.smokehouse/1: The smokehouse always smells of something wonderful. I always stop to breathe it in.
dialogue.chat.village_life.smokehouse/2: Nothing beats a smokehouse ham on a cold night.
dialogue.chat.village_life.smokehouse/3: I can smell the smokehouse from here. Must be ham day.
dialogue.chat.village_life.tannery/1: The tannery stinks to high heavens, but the leather is worth it.
dialogue.chat.village_life.tannery/2: I bought a belt from the tannery last week. Holds up fine.
dialogue.chat.village_life.tannery/3: Upwind of the tannery is where you want to live. Ask my cousin.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_smoker/: I need a smoker before I can finish these cuts.
No smoker nearby. I cannot cook the meat here.
Set a smoker down and I'll get right to work.
Without a smoker, my work stalls.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_input/1: I've no fresh meat or fish to cook.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_input/2: The hooks are empty. I need more to smoke.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_input/3: Bring raw cuts and I'll have supper ready soon.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_input/4: Nothing left to put on the fire.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_input/5: My supplies are spent. I need fresh stock.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_input/6: No raw food on hand right now, %1$s.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.unsupporte: I don't know how to cook %2$s yet!
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_fuel/1: The smoker has gone cold. I need fuel.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_fuel/2: No coal or charcoal left for the fire.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_fuel/3: I can keep cooking once the hearth is fed.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_fuel/4: The fire won't hold without fuel.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_fuel/5: Could someone restock fuel for the smoker?
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_fuel/6: I need something to burn before I can continue.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.output_blo: My packs are full. I need chest space.
Cooked meat has nowhere to be stored.
Clear some storage and I can keep working.
I cannot carry another cut until this is stowed.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.unreachabl: I can't reach my smoker from here.
Something blocks the way to my work.
I need a clear path to the smoker.
I keep getting stuck before I reach the fire.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.out_of_sco: I'm too far from my butcher post.
I need to stay near my smoker to work.
This is beyond my work area.
Keep the butcher setup closer and I'll manage it.
dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_valid_t: No butcher work needs doing right now.
I'll wait by the smoker for the next task.
Nothing to tend at the moment.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_rod/1: I could use a fishing rod to work with.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_rod/2: My hands alone won't catch fish.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_rod/3: A rod, please, and I'll get to the water.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_rod/4: No rod in my pack. I can't fish like this.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_rod/5: Spare a fishing rod and I'll fill the barrel.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_rod/6: I need tackle before I can cast a line.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_water: There's no water near my barrel.
I can't fish on dry land.
Move me closer to a pond or river, please.
This barrel needs water nearby if I'm to work.
Without open water, my rod sits idle.
I've looked all around and found no water to fish.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_stora: My catches need somewhere to go.
A chest would help, these fish shouldn't rot on me.
The barrel's full, and I have no other place to stow fish.
Clear some storage and I'll keep fishing.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.unreacha: I can't reach the water from here.
Something blocks my path to the shore.
The way to my fishing spot is obstructed.
Clear the path and I'll be at the water.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.dock_fir: A proper spot for casting. Thanks for building it.
I'll work this dock every day if you let me.
Better than the muddy bank, this is.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_rod.f: Oh sweetheart, got a rod I could borrow? I promise I'll make it worth your while.
A girl needs her tackle, darling. Help a pretty thing out?
Come closer, love. I'd fish if I had a rod — know anyone who could lend me one?
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_water: Honey, all this talk of getting wet and not a drop of water in sight.
Sugar, I need water like you need sweet company. Help me out?
Find me a nice pond, handsome, and I'll do the rest.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_stora: My barrel's stuffed, darling, and not in the fun way.
Sweetie, I need somewhere to put my catch. Got room for me?
Cozy up a chest for me, love, my barrel's full to the brim.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.unreacha: Sugar, something's in my way and you know how I hate being stood up.
Darling, the path to my spot's a mess. Clear it for me?
Come sweep me a path, handsome, and I'll sweep you off your feet.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_rod.g: No rod. Of course. Why would there be.
Empty hands, empty pack. Fitting, really.
A rod would help. Not that anyone's listening.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_water: No water anywhere. Just like the warmth of friendship.
The pond's gone dry, or never was. Hard to say which is worse.
I need water. But I'll probably just stand here.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_stora: No room for the catch. No room for me, either, it seems.
The barrel rejects me. Even wood turns its back.
Everything's full except my heart. Another chest would help.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.unreacha: The path is blocked. Maybe it's a sign.
I can't reach the water. I can't reach much of anything, really.
Something's in the way. Feels fitting.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_rod.g: No rod, no fish, no profit. Fix it.
A rod is a tool. Tools make coin. Bring me one.
You want fish? Rods don't grow on trees. Well, technically...
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_water: No water means no fish means no revenue. Unacceptable.
Dig me a pond, close by. Time is emeralds.
I need water. Preferably before my competitors get any.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_stora: Barrel's full. That's a good problem. Give me another.
Storage overflowing. More chests means more inventory means more profit.
Expand the operation. I need another container, now.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.unreacha: Blocked path. That's lost revenue right there.
Can't reach the water, can't move product. Unacceptable.
Clear the way. Every minute I'm here costs us both.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_rod.o: The rod has gone. Perhaps it swam away.
No rod. The fish are relieved, I suspect.
A rod, a rod, my kingdom for a rod. Or half a rod. I'm flexible.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_water: The water has gone elsewhere. Perhaps a party.
Where there is no water, there are no fish. A profound insight.
I dreamed of a pond. Woke up. Still no pond. Please find one.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_stora: The barrel refuses further fish. It is a barrel with standards.
Too many fish, not enough box. A tale as old as time.
Another container, please. The fish have opinions about crowding.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.unreacha: An invisible wall. Or a real one. Either way, unfortunate.
The path is a riddle today, and I do not have the answer.
Something blocks the way. Perhaps it is me. Perhaps it is geometry.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_rod.c: How am I supposed to fish with nothing, exactly?
Someone's taken my rod, haven't they. Hand one over.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_water: No water. Brilliant. Absolutely brilliant.
A fisherman with no water. What are we, a comedy?
You expect me to fish in the dirt? Find me a pond already.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_stora: Barrel's full. Should've thought of that, shouldn't we.
Fish everywhere, nowhere to put them. Planning, it's called planning.
Another chest. Today, preferably. I've had enough.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.unreacha: Path's blocked. Who leaves things in the way like this?
I can't reach the water because someone couldn't be bothered to clean up.
Move whatever it is out of my way. Honestly.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_rod.r: No rod on me. No worries, whenever you've got one.
Could use a rod. Take your time, I'll be here.
A rod would be nice. Plenty of time, friend.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_water: No water to cast in. I'll wait 'til one turns up.
Point me at a pond, I'll take it from there. No rush.
Any water nearby? I'll just enjoy the quiet until you find one.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_stora: Barrel's full. A spare chest anywhere around? No pressure.
My catch needs a home. I'll hold onto it 'til you sort one.
Whenever you get a moment, we could use another container.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.unreacha: Path's a bit tricky today. Sort it when you can.
Can't quite reach the water. Nothing urgent, just a heads up.
Something's in the way. I'll wait it out.
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_rod.p: Hey hey, no rod! Wanna go find me one? I'll do a little jig.
Psst — I'm rod-less over here! Rescue me?
No rod, no fish, no fun. Help a pal out!
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_water: Oh no, dry land as far as I can see! Pond, please?
Fish can't fly, last I checked. Got any water around?
Gimme a puddle, a pond, a bathtub — anything wet!
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.no_stora: Barrel's burstin'! Gonna start stuffing fish in my pockets.
I need another chest or these fish are going rogue!
Room for one more? Or ten more? Please?
dialogue.chat.fisherman_request.unreacha: Road closed ahead! Send a hero to clear the way!
Something's blockin' the path. Tag, you're it!
Can't get to the water — obstacle course got me good.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.no_kitchen/1: I need a proper kitchen before I can cook.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.no_kitchen/2: There's no kitchen station ready for me.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.no_kitchen/3: Give me a kitchen and I'll feed everyone.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.no_kitchen/4: I can't start without a working kitchen.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.no_ingredient: The pantry's thin. I need fresh ingredients.
I'm short on ingredients for today's meal.
Bring me supplies and I'll keep the pots going.
I've got stations, but nothing to cook.
I need more produce and meat for the kitchen.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.no_storage/1: Kitchen stores are full; nowhere to put this.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.no_storage/2: I need empty storage for prepared food.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.no_storage/3: Clear a chest and I can keep cooking.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.no_storage/4: I can't carry more meals without storage.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.unreachable/1: I can't reach my station from here.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.unreachable/2: Something is blocking the kitchen path.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.unreachable/4: I need a clear path to cook.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.unreachable/5: I keep getting stuck before I can work.
dialogue.chat.cook_request.unreachable/6: Could someone clear the way to the kitchen?
dialogue.chat.cook_request.unsupported_i: I don't know how to cook %2$s yet!
dialogue.chat.cook_request.skill_too_low: I see recipes on the shelf, but they're beyond me still.
I'm not skilled enough for the fancier dishes yet.
Give me time. I'll learn to cook those soon enough.
Those recipes need a steadier hand than mine... for now.
I need more practice before I can tackle those meals.
I'll stick to what I know while I sharpen my skills.
dialogue.chat.cook_progress.tier_up/1: I've picked up a few new tricks in the kitchen!
dialogue.chat.cook_progress.tier_up/2: My cooking is getting better, I can feel it.
dialogue.chat.cook_progress.tier_up/3: I can handle trickier recipes now.
dialogue.chat.cook_progress.tier_up/4: The meals are coming together faster these days.
dialogue.chat.cook_progress.tier_up/5: Another step up in my culinary craft!
dialogue.chat.cook_progress.tier_up/6: I've grown into a better cook.
dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/1: <scared>I... I can barely stand.</scared> Please, do you have anything to eat?
dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/2: <scared>Everything's going dark around the edges...</scared> I need food, %1$s.
dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/3: <sad>I don't know how much longer I can go on like this without a meal...</sad>
dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/4: <nervous>*clutches stomach*</nervous> ...I'm sorry, I can't focus on anything right now.
dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/5: <scared>If I don't eat something soon, I'm going to collapse right here.</scared>
dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/7: <nervous>I can't remember the last time I ate. My hands won't stop shaking.</nervous>
dialogue.chat.hunger.starving/8: <sad>I'd give anything for even a piece of bread right now, %1$s.</sad>
dialogue.chat.thirst.dehydrated/1: <scared>My throat feels like sand...</scared> I need water now.
dialogue.chat.thirst.dehydrated/3: <nervous>I'm so dehydrated I can hardly think straight.</nervous>
dialogue.hug.success/3: <happy>At least one thing made my day today.</happy>
dialogue.hug.fail/4: <angry>After you called me a dinosaur last week? No.</angry>
dialogue.hug.fail/5: <angry>Quite frankly, you don't deserve a hug after you did that.</angry>
dialogue.hug.fail/6: <yell>Ew, get off me!</yell> You have disgusting germs!
spouse.dialogue.hug.success/1: <flirty>I love being entangled in your arms!</flirty>
spouse.dialogue.hug.success/3: <happy>Would you rather only being able to hug or kiss?</happy>
spouse.dialogue.hug.fail/1: <angry>Why don't you go hug your ex?</angry>
childp.dialogue.hug.success/1: <excited>*Kisses on your cheek* You're the best ever!</excited>
childp.dialogue.hug.success/2: <excited>I'm going to be as strong as you are one day!</excited>
childp.dialogue.hug.success/4: <happy>I love hugs! You're soft and warm!</happy>
childp.dialogue.hug.fail/2: <nervous>Stop it! I don't want people to see!</nervous>
dialogue.kiss.success/1: <flirty>I wish this moment would last forever.</flirty>
spouse.dialogue.kiss.success/1: <flirty>I fall in love all over again when our lips meet!</flirty>
spouse.dialogue.kiss.success/2: <whisper>Time stops ticking when I'm with you.</whisper>
spouse.dialogue.kiss.success/5: <happy>I wouldn't trade you for anyone in the world!</happy>
spouse.dialogue.kiss.fail/5: <angry>Now that we're married I can tell you how lousy you are at kissing.</angry>
spouse.dialogue.kiss.fail/6: <yell>Ugh! What did you eat recently?</yell> I think I touched some food!
spouse.dialogue.kiss.fail/7: <nervous>Babe! Not in front of the trees!</nervous>
dialogue.flirt.success/5: <excited>That was so adorable! You had me at "hello"!</excited>
dialogue.flirt.success/7: <flirty>Oh stop it! You're making me blush.</flirty>
dialogue.flirt.fail/2: Aw.... Wait, <angry>you told the baker the same thing!</angry>
dialogue.flirt.fail/5: <angry>A zombie has a better chance than you.</angry>
dialogue.flirt.fail/7: <angry>Don't look at me like that and never say that again.</angry>
spouse.dialogue.flirt.success/1: <excited>*Blushes* Well, how about we do something like that, then!</excited>
spouse.dialogue.flirt.success/2: <happy>Aw, you said that when we first met.</happy>
spouse.dialogue.flirt.fail/2: This one is getting old... <angry>like you.</angry>
spouse.dialogue.flirt.fail/4: <angry>Talk to the tree, it cares more.</angry>
dialogue.joke.creative.success/3: <excited>That's the best I have ever heard!</excited>
dialogue.joke.creative.success/5: <excited>Hahaha! Wow you're really funny!</excited> Have you ever thought of becoming a comedian?
dialogue.joke.creative.success/6: <yell>BAHAHHA!</yell> <happy>That was the best joke I've heard in a long time!</happy>
dialogue.joke.creative.failed/4: <angry>Did you just make a joke like that?</angry>
dialogue.joke.creative.failed/7: <angry>Why would that be funny?</angry> Do everyone a favour and stick to your day job.
dialogue.story.success/1: <excited>Really? I can't believe that all happened!</excited>
dialogue.story.success/3: <happy>That was a really good story! Is it original?</happy>

interaction.engage.success/1: <excited>Yes! I will marry you! I love you!</excited>
interaction.engage.success/4: <nervous>Is...is this real? I mean, this moment, not the ring. But the ring is real, right?</nervous>
interaction.engage.success/5: <happy>I just want this moment to last forever...!</happy>
interaction.engage.success/8: <excited>Are you sure?! I... I can't believe this is happening..!!</excited>
interaction.engage.success/10: <sad>O-oh no...</sad> <happy>*sobs* I swore I wasn't gonna cry when this day came, b-but I can't stop myself..!</happy>
spouse.interaction.marry.success/1: <excited>It's a dream come true! I'll love you forever!</excited>
spouse.interaction.marry.success/3: <happy>I'm happy to be married to you, %1$s.</happy>
spouse.interaction.marry.success/4: <excited>I can't wait to start our life together!</excited>
spouse.interaction.marry.success/6: <happy>Now that I found you, I don't want to ever have to be without you.</happy>
spouse.interaction.marry.success/7: <happy>I didn't know it possible to ever love someone as much as I love you.</happy>
spouse.interaction.marry.success/8: <happy>I feel as if I'll be able to face anything life throws at me from now on because you're by my side.</happy>
spouse.interaction.marry.success/9: <happy>*sniffle* If I say anything sappy I'm really going to start to cry..!</happy>
spouse.interaction.marry.success/10: <excited>I feel so complete... but I know this is just the beginning!</excited>
interaction.relationship.fail.lowhearts/: <angry>My standards are low.. but not that low.</angry>
<nervous>I can not take your proposal seriously yet...</nervous>
<nervous>I think we would need to spend more time getting to know each other first...</nervous>
<sad>It's not the right time... I'm sorry.</sad>
interaction.marry.fail.married/4: <sad>Oh no, I feel bad... I have a partner I love dearly.</sad>
interaction.marry.fail.married/5: <sad>I already have someone very important to me... I'm sorry.</sad>
interaction.relationship.fail.playermarr: <angry>Uh...I see that ring on your finger. You're already married!</angry>
<angry>Just what are you trying to do? You're already married!</angry>
<angry>I'm appalled! You already have a spouse.</angry>
<angry>I don't know where you came from, but around here we don't accept polygamy!</angry>
<angry>How could you?! I'm telling your spouse!</angry>

<nervous>Sorry bud! I don't swing that way!</nervous>
<sad>I really like you, but not that way...</sad>
interaction.promise.success/1: <happy>I'm glad that you feel the same way.</happy>
interaction.promise.success/2: <happy>They're beautiful. I can't wait for us to become even closer.</happy>
interaction.promise.success/3: <excited>Oh! I guess we're locked down now, huh? I'm glad you finally made us official.</excited>
interaction.promise.success/4: <happy>Really? You took your time! I was wondering if I had to ask you out first!</happy>
interaction.promise.success/5: <excited>What pretty flowers! Oh, they're for me?</excited> <happy>I didn't know you felt that way. I'd love to be with you.</happy>

interaction.adopt.success/2: <happy>*cries* Is this real? I can't even.. I love you both so much!</happy>

spouse.dialogue.chat.success/2: <happy>Honey, let's go camping sometime. Doesn't that sound like fun?</happy>

dialogue.joke.monster.success/2: <excited>What? That zombie really tried to beat you to death with a shovel? Hahaha!</excited>
dialogue.joke.monster.success/3: <excited>You really showed that spider who's boss! Haha!</excited>
dialogue.joke.monster.success/4: <excited>Hey, you really got a skeleton to kill a creeper?! Now that's amazing, haha!!</excited>
dialogue.joke.monster.success/5: <excited>Hahah! God, are cave spiders really this dumb?!</excited>
dialogue.joke.monster.failed/1: <angry>Skeletons are sentient beings! How dare you!</angry>
dialogue.joke.monster.failed/2: <angry>... Who jokes about creepers blowing up in this day and age? Seriously!</angry>
dialogue.joke.monster.failed/3: <sad>Zombies and skeletons used to be humans just like us, in case you forgot.</sad>
dialogue.joke.animal.success/1: <happy>Unfortunate for the sheep to lose its wool, but funny!</happy>
dialogue.joke.animal.success/2: <happy>Then the wolf fell in love with the sheep.</happy>
dialogue.joke.animal.success/3: <excited>That's hilarious! I can't believe chickens can do that!</excited>
dialogue.joke.animal.failed/2: <sad>That poor sheep! That's not funny at all!</sad>
dialogue.joke.animal.failed/3: <angry>Don't speak about my pig like that!</angry>
dialogue.joke.animal.failed/5: <angry>Don't joke about the cow's eyebrows like that!</angry>

spouse.dialogue.joke.creative.success/5: <happy>This is why I married you! One of the best qualities you have!</happy>

spouse.dialogue.story.success/2: <excited>You were so rebellious! I love it!</excited>
spouse.dialogue.story.success/4: <flirty>It was that moment when I fell in love with you!</flirty>

childp.dialogue.story.success/1: <excited>What!? You really did that?!</excited> But...what happened to your friend?
childp.dialogue.story.success/2: <excited>I want to explore a cave, too! Let's go!</excited>
childp.dialogue.story.success/3: <excited>One day I'll kill more creepers than you!</excited>
childp.dialogue.story.success/4: <excited>Oh, oh, oh! Can we climb a tree, too?!</excited>

childp.dialogue.story.fail/5: <angry>Someone said you were a bad person, and I believe them!</angry>
dialogue.story.exploring.success/1: <excited>Cool! I'll explore the world too, one day!</excited>
dialogue.story.exploring.success/2: <excited>Wow! It must be amazing to just get to travel and explore.</excited> I love my village, family and friends, but listening to you really makes me feel jealous!
dialogue.story.exploring.success/3: <happy>You must be really brave to just go and explore the unknown.</happy>
dialogue.story.exploring.fail/2: <angry>Wow. Don't cut yourself on that edge, tough guy.</angry>
dialogue.story.nether.success/2: <excited>Wow, how have you even managed to survive in such a treacherous place? I'm impressed.</excited>
dialogue.story.nether.success/4: <nervous>You must be really brave to go there. Aren't you scared when you go? N-Not that I would be...</nervous>
dialogue.story.nether.fail/1: <angry>I don't think you've ever set foot into the Nether.</angry>
dialogue.story.nether.fail/3: <angry>I don't care if you've been to the Nether. You couldn't tell a story to save your life.</angry>
dialogue.story.nether.fail/4: <angry>... you don't look nearly strong enough to go to the Nether.</angry>
dialogue.story.enderdragon.success/1: <excited>Incredible! And did you bring the dragon egg with you?</excited>
dialogue.story.enderdragon.success/2: <excited>Oh my! Have you really killed the mighty dragon of legend?!</excited> The village will sing of your endeavors for generations!
dialogue.story.enderdragon.fail/1: <angry>Hah! Have you gone nuts?. The ender dragon is a myth.</angry>
dialogue.story.enderdragon.fail/2: <angry>You must be joking. No human could even hope to scratch that dragon!</angry>
dialogue.story.wither.success/1: <excited>Impossible! I've heard the Wither causes unimaginable destruction!</excited>
dialogue.story.wither.success/2: <excited>You've bested even the Wither?! T-That's incredible!</excited>

dialogue.kiss.slap/2: <angry>Try that again, and the next one's going to leave a mark!</angry>

spouse.endmarriage/1: <angry>I've had it. You don't treat me well enough. I'm leaving you!</angry>
spouse.endmarriage/2: <angry>I'm leaving. Forever! Don't look for me.</angry>

spouse.endmarriage/4: <sad>%1$s, this is goodbye.</sad> <angry>Don't try to follow me.</angry>

spouse.divorce/3: <angry>You can finally go after that floozy that you've been eyeing %1$s!</angry>
spouse.divorcePaper/2: <sad>If you think this is the best. I will always love you, %1$s</sad>
spouse.divorcePaper/3: <sad>*tears form in their eyes* I will always love you..</sad>
villager.grieving/1: <sad>How could this happen? He was always so full of life.</sad>
villager.grieving/2: <sad>I can't believe she is gone. This is just too much to bear.</sad>
villager.grieving/3: <sad>Why did you have to leave us so soon.</sad>
villager.grieving/4: <sad>I'm going to miss you so much.</sad>
villager.grieving/5: <sad>I don't know how I'll go on without you.</sad>
villager.grieving/6: <sad>This grave is a constant reminder of the pain I feel without you.</sad>
villager.grieving/8: <sad>I'll always cherish the memories I have with you</sad>
